title: German Almond Bao Delight
description: A sweet and delicate dessert inspired by German tradition, featuring crispy almond bao and a delightful filling.
instructions: 2. Roll out the almond bao dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
4. Brush the edges with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
5. Place the dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. In a separate bowl, mix together the granulated sugar and ground almonds.
8. Once the bao are cool, fill each with the sugar-almond mixture.
9. Dust with confectioners' sugar before serving.
10. Serve warm or at room temperature.
